product.applications: Compressed air drying, fluoride removal, hydrogen and natural gas dehydration
product.specs: High surface area; low dust; high crush strength; broad adsorption range
product.overview: Activated alumina is a durable adsorbent for drying and fluoride removal in industrial utilities and process plants.
product.technicalNotes: Temperature and regeneration cycle should be matched to service conditions; suitable for high-throughput beds.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Preferred where high strength, low dust media are needed for continuous drying or defluoridation duties.
